zh.Kinsale, Cork, Munster, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 科克金薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: Darbforgaill O'Brien是Donnchad MacBriain King of Munster和Cacht ingen Ragnaill的女兒，於大約1000年出生在愛爾蘭萊音斯特。她於1034年與Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland在愛爾蘭萊音斯特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1080年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克金薩爾享年82歲。

zh-hans.slain by the Meath men at Donlah: 澳大利亚昆斯藍德米亞斯
zh-hans.Kinsale, Cork, Munster, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 科克金薩爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Darbforgaill O'Brien是Donnchad MacBriain King of Munster和Cacht ingen Ragnaill的女儿，于大约1000年出生在爱尔兰萊音斯特。她于1034年与Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland在爱尔兰萊音斯特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1080年在爱尔兰庫迪 科克金薩爾享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: O'Brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

variants.name: O'Bryon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish William Kevin.

variants.name: Bryan
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Bryant  .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Ó Briain, see O'Brien .

variants.name: O'Briant
meanings: Irish: variant of O'Brien , with excrescent -t.

variants.name: McBrien
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Seamus.
Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Briain ‘son of Brian’. See O'Brien and Bryan .

variants.name: O'Bryan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish James Patrick, Padraic.

en.lifeSummary: Darbforgaill O'Brien was born about 1000, in Leinster, Ireland as the daughter of Donnchad MacBriain King of Munster and Cacht ingen Ragnaill. She married Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland in 1034, in Leinster, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1080, in Kinsale, County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Darbforgaill O'Brien est née environ 1000, à Leinster, Irlande, fille de Donnchad MacBriain King of Munster et Cacht ingen Ragnaill. Elle a épousé Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland en 1034, à Leinster, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1080, à Kinsale, County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Darbforgaill O'Brien wurde um 1000 in Leinster, Irland, als Tochter von Donnchad MacBriain King of Munster und Cacht ingen Ragnaill geboren. Sie hat 1034 in Leinster, Irland Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1080 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Kinsale, County Cork, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Darbforgaill O'Brien è nata il circa 1000 nel Leinster, Irlanda come figlia di Donnchad MacBriain King of Munster e Cacht ingen Ragnaill. Lei sposato Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland nel 1034, nel Leinster, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1080, nel Kinsale, County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.Leinster Province, Ireland: アイルランドレインスター
ja.slain by the Meath men at Donlah: オーストラリアクイーンスランドメアス
ja.Dublin, Ireland: アイルランドダブリン
ja.Leinster, Ireland: アイルランドレインスター
ja.Kinsale, Cork, Munster, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ コルクキンサル
ja.lifeSummary: Darbforgaill O'Brienは約1000年にアイルランドレインスターでDonnchad MacBriain King of MunsterとCacht ingen Ragnaillの娘として生まれた。1034年にアイルランドレインスターでDiarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Irelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1080年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクキンサルで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Darbforgaill O'Brien(은)는 대략 1000년 아일랜드 레인스터에서 Donnchad MacBriain King of Munster(와)과 Cacht ingen Ragnaill의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1034년 아일랜드 레인스터에서 Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1080년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 킨세일에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1000–about 1080: tany ho any amin'ny 1000–tany ho any amin'ny 1080

pt.lifeSummary: Darbforgaill O'Brien nasceu aproximadamente 1000, em Leinster, Irlanda filha de Donnchad MacBriain King of Munster e Cacht ingen Ragnaill. Ela casou-se com Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland em 1034, em Leinster, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1080, em Kinsale, County Cork, Irlanda, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Darbforgaill O'Brien родилась около 1000 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия. Её родителей звали Donnchad MacBriain King of Munster и Cacht ingen Ragnaill. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland в 1034 г. в местности линстир, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1080 г. в местности кинсеил, коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 82 лет.

sm.about 1000–about 1080: e tusa o le 1000–e tusa o le 1080

es.lifeSummary: Darbforgaill O'Brien nació aproximadamente 1000, en Leinster, Irlanda como hija de Donnchad MacBriain King of Munster y Cacht ingen Ragnaill. Se casó con Diarmait MacMáil na mBó King of Leinster and Ireland en 1034, en Leinster, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1080, en Kinsale, County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 82 años.
